heading: Course Roadmap
intro: Four parts. One coherent journey from history to the future.

prologue.label: PROLOGUE
prologue.title: The History of Blockchain
prologue.description: From the cypherpunk movement to the birth of Bitcoin — the ideological and technical foundations that made decentralized money possible.

section1.label: SECTION 1
section1.title: Introduction to Blockchain Technology
section1.description: DLT, hashing, Merkle trees, blocks, wallets, digital signatures, transactions, and consensus mechanisms — all the building blocks explained.

section2.label: SECTION 2
section2.title: Bitcoin and Beyond
section2.description: Why Bitcoin was a breakthrough, its supply model, network mechanics, node distribution, security model, and the Lightning Network.

section3.label: SECTION 3
section3.title: What's Next for Blockchain?
section3.description: Real-world impact, Web3 evolution, ethical considerations, energy consumption, and future trends shaping the next decade.
